{{Quote|I am Modon Kira. My ancestors have fought beside the Jedi since the time when Master Arca saved our people.|Modon Kira|<ref name="EE2" />}}
'''Modon Kira''' was the King of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He resided in [[Kira Fortress]] and was the husband of [[Kira|Lady Kira]].<ref name="EE2" />

He helped [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Empatojayos Brand]] attack Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine's]] Imperial Shuttle.<ref name="EE2" />

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]]
